free_text: Measurement of secondary neutron spectra from 6,7Li
6Li enriched to 90.5%, 4 cm long x 2 cm in diameter,
7Li enriched to 95.2%, 4 cm long x 2.5 cm in diameter,
encapsulated in Al cans (0.1 mm thick)
flight path 2.7 m, resolution time 1.2 ns,
energy resolution about 5% for 14.2 MeV neutrons
biased at 1.3 MeV to reduce gamma-ray background
Total error about mainly comes from:
proof-copy approved by authors and authors
